_comment: ADAPT-3614 — Add the 'dbOptions' block below to your conf/config.json to configure the MongoDB connection pool.
_notes: This project uses Mongoose 5.x which depends on MongoDB Node.js driver v3.x.
Driver v3 uses 'poolSize' (NOT 'maxPoolSize' — that is a driver v4+ option name).
Driver v3 does NOT support: maxPoolSize, minPoolSize, heartbeatFrequencyMS.
TLS/SSL for DocumentDB does NOT go here — it is already embedded in your dbConnectionUri (?tls=true&tlsCAFile=...).
poolSize × number_of_active_tenants = total connections held against DocumentDB.
Tune poolSize against your DocumentDB instance tier (e.g. db.r5.large supports ~250 connections).
retryWrites=false must remain in your dbConnectionUri — DocumentDB does not support retryable writes.
